description: Complete dialogue lines for Q003, Q004, Q005 — 15 lines across Elder_Kael, Hunter_01, Gatherer_04, Guard NPCs

NPC_Elder_Kael_07.role: Tribal Elder — quest giver, authority figure

briefing.text: The herd grazes near the river bend at dusk. Three animals — the smallest one, not the mother. Bring back enough meat for two days. Do not come back with excuses.

success_accept.text: You return with meat. Good. The tribe will eat tonight. But do not mistake one hunt for skill. The great lizards remember faces. They will come for you again — and next time, they will not be alone. Rest. Tomorrow we move camp before the rains flood the valley.

failure_reject.text: You came back empty-handed. The tribe cannot eat your excuses. Go out again — but this time watch where the prey drinks. At dusk, near the river bend. That is where they are vulnerable. Do not return until you have something to show.

ambient_01.text: The dry season shortens the grass. The big lizards range further when they cannot smell water. Keep that in mind.
ambient_01.trigger: Random ambient — 15% chance on player proximity

ambient_02.text: I have seen three winters where the herd did not return. We ate bark and roots. Do not let that happen again.
ambient_02.trigger: Random ambient — 10% chance on player proximity

NPC_Hunter_01.tone: Direct, low voice, never panics — reads terrain instinctively

approach_tip.text: Stay downwind. Always. If you can smell them, they can smell you ten times stronger. Circle wide to the east before you close in.

kill_confirm.text: Clean kill. Good. Now move fast — the blood smell carries far. We have maybe ten minutes before something larger investigates.

flanking_advice.text: Do not run straight. The big ones track movement — they are faster than you think. Cut left, use the rocks. Make it work to reach you.

escort_confirm.text: The children are at the treeline. I count twelve. Two are missing — the twins from the eastern shelter. Someone needs to go back.

NPC_Guard_10.role: Camp perimeter guard — first to detect threats
NPC_Guard_10.tone: Tense, urgent — speaks in short bursts under pressure

birds_stopped.text: Something is wrong. The birds stopped singing. All of them — at once. That only happens when something big is moving through the brush. Get the children to the treeline. Now. Do not wait for the others.
birds_stopped.trigger: QuestObj1_AlertTribe — pre-attack trigger (30s before T-Rex spawn)

trex_sighted.text: There — past the ridge. It is already inside the perimeter. Move!

all_clear.text: It moved off. Following the river south. We have time — but not much. The camp needs to move before nightfall.

NPC_Gatherer_04.role: Resource specialist — knows terrain, plant cycles, water sources
NPC_Gatherer_04.tone: Observant, detail-oriented, speaks about environment with precision

resource_briefing.text: We need berries, flint, and water before the dry season locks in. The berry bushes are near the eastern rocks — heavy this season. Flint is at the riverbed, half a day east. Water from the spring, not the river — the river has been cloudy since the herd crossed upstream.

resource_warning.text: The berry bushes near the eastern rocks are heavy this season. But watch your step — the ground there is soft. Sinkholes open without warning after the rains. And stay away from the tall grass past the ridge. Something has been sleeping there. I saw the flattened ground this morning.

flint_tip.text: The good flint is darker — almost black. The grey pieces crack wrong when you strike them. Look for the dark seams in the riverbed stone.

water_tip.text: Taste it before you fill the skins. If it is bitter, move upstream. Bitter water means something died in the source. We cannot afford sick hunters right now.

delivery_complete.text: This will last us eight days if we are careful. Ten if the Elder agrees to reduce the evening fire — less cooking means less waste. I will speak to her.

handoff_to_audio_agent_16.priority: DL_Guard_Q004_Warning already recorded — match this urgency register for Guard_Sighted and Guard_Clear
